name: sms-reader
description: Read and search SMS messages from the Android device running BotDrop

action.description: The action to perform when reading SMS

limit.description: Number of messages to retrieve (for 'recent' and 'search' actions)

keyword.description: Keyword to search for in SMS content (for 'search' action, also works with 'recent')

latest.description: Get the most recent SMS message

recent.description: Get recent SMS messages. Use 'keyword' parameter to filter results.

search.description: Search SMS messages by keyword across a larger message pool

check.description: Check if SMS permission is granted

systemPrompt.context: You have access to the device's SMS messages through the sms-reader tool. You should proactively use this tool when the user asks about verification codes, OTP, messages, texts, or any SMS-related queries.
guidelines: AUTOMATICALLY use the sms-reader tool when user asks about verification codes, OTP, messages, texts, or SMS
For verification code queries, use 'latest' action to get the most recent SMS
For 'any new messages' queries, use 'unread' action
For searching specific content, use 'search' action with the keyword parameter
For filtering recent messages by keyword, use 'recent' action with keyword parameter
Summarize SMS content clearly, highlighting important information like verification codes
If SMS permission is not granted, guide the user to enable it in BotDrop app settings

examples.thought: User is asking about verification code. I should automatically call sms-reader with 'latest' action.

examples.user: What was my last text message?
examples.thought: User wants to know their last text. Call sms-reader with 'latest' action.
User asking about new/unread messages. Use 'unread' action.

examples.user: Did I get the verification code?
examples.thought: User asking about verification code. Use 'latest' to check most recent SMS.
User wants to check recent SMS messages. Use 'recent' action with a reasonable limit.

examples.user: Search for messages from 顺丰
examples.thought: User wants to search SMS with keyword '顺丰'. Use 'search' action.

examples.user: 查找包含验证码的短信
examples.thought: User wants to find SMS containing '验证码'. Use 'search' action.
